programs.label: English Word Collector
programs.description: My Grade 12 final project: "English Word Collector" v1.5b, a vocabulary database with a full menu system (enter, delete, edit, print, list, quiz/test, a learning game, save/load, search, help and about screens). Built from ~40 Turbo C++ source files.

programs.label: English Word Collector (Earlier Build)
programs.description: An earlier compiled build of the same word collector project, kept alongside the final version to show how the program evolved.

programs.label: Menu Editor
programs.description: A standalone utility I wrote to build and edit the binary .INI menu files (colors, hotkeys, item layout) consumed by my "Main Menu V2.1" menu engine, instead of hand-editing the binary format.

programs.label: Box Drawing Demo
programs.description: A test program for the bordered-box-with-title-and-shadow routine used to draw every window in the word collector's UI.

programs.label: Box Drawing Demo v2
programs.description: A follow-up version of the box-drawing routine, adding single/double border styles and title framing options.

programs.label: Button Demo
programs.description: A test program for the clickable-looking "button" UI widget (with highlight and shadow) used for Yes/No prompts.

programs.label: Splash Logo v1
programs.description: The animated startup splash screen (v1.01b) that shows "Luxi-Soft Presents / A Horace Chan Production" with scrolling ASCII art and color-cycling text.

programs.label: Splash Logo v2
programs.description: A revised version (v1.5b) of the animated startup splash screen with updated ASCII art.

programs.label: Menu Engine Demo
programs.description: A test program for "Main Menu V2.1", the reusable data-driven menu engine that reads a binary .INI layout file and drives the word collector's main menu.

programs.label: Quit Confirmation Demo
programs.description: A test program for the "Are you sure you want to exit?" confirmation dialog, with Yes/No buttons and a scrolling status line.
